findings.message: actions/checkout@v6 is used without persist-credentials: false

remediation.summary: Add `persist-credentials: false` under the checkout step's `with:` block unless the workflow has a reviewed reason to keep credentials persisted.

findings.whyItMatters: Persisted checkout credentials can widen token exposure inside a workflow run and make credential exfiltration easier.
